case_title: HENDRICKS LAW, P.C., VS. CHARLES VOLK

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLK, CHARLES D/B/A MR. THRIVE MEDIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN HENDRICKS, ESQ. PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW, P.C., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VOLK, CHARLES D/B/A MR. THRIVE MEDIA
ORDER DENYING VENUE CHALLENGE, AND CONTINUING CASE FOR HEARING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW, P.C., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLK, CHARLES D/B/A MR. THRIVE MEDIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, $5,000.00 PLUS COURT COSTS. PLAINTIFF SUSTAINED ITS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE ANY USABLE PRODUCT DESPITE PAYMENT. *PLAINTIFF'S COSTS SHALL BE REDUCED TO $50.00 IF PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON OR BEFORE JULY 6, 2023. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-14-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW, P.C. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES VOLK IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW, P.C. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHN HENDRICKS, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES VOLK IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HENDRICKS LAW, P.C., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VOLK, CHARLES D/B/A MR. THRIVE MEDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) JOHN F. STEPHENS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW, P.C., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $130.FILED AFTER JUDGMENT. SERVED MAR-25-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOLK, CHARLES D/B/A MR. THRIVE MEDIA
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2023 - VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED, CONTINUED FOR HEARING TO JUL-05-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HENDRICKS LAW P.C. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN HENDRICKS, ESQ, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES VOLK IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
